text.title: Linear Issue Tracking (Project Manager) Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Linear Issue Tracking (Project Manager).

example.scenario: PM running 5-person eng team on Linear. Daily 10-min 09:00 triage; cycle planning Mondays; mid-cycle Wednesday; retro Fridays. Weekly status post in #stakeholders. Quarterly velocity shows 0.72 completion = healthy.
